name: rabbit-config
summary: Configuration manager. Hosts the /rabbit-config skill (mutation surface) that dispatches subcommand invocations to contract.lib.mutation. At Stop and SessionStart, iterates every feature's CONFIGURATION declarations and emits alerts for active overrides.
deprecation_criterion: when the rabbit CLI exposes native configuration mutation that subsumes this feature
spec_no_change_reason: spec.md Inv 18 path already updated in prior commit 2a9f330; this cycle only updates contract.md reads.files path, test DECL constant, and feature.json version
